untranslatable_reason: Signal requires fundamental analysis confirmation (2+ independent fundamental indicators: supply/demand, macro trends, event catalysts) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed technical indicators. ADX_14 used as proxy for trend confirmation, but fundamental thesis validation is not quantifiable in this technical-only ruleset.
translation_notes: Used ADX_14 > 25 as a proxy for 'strong directional bias' and trend confirmation. Position sizing (1% risk per trade) and profit-run extension (1.5x risk target with partial exit at 50%) are implemented via stop_loss_pct and returns-based exit conditions. Loss acceptance threshold hardcoded at 2.0% per parameters. The core fundamental requirement cannot be satisfied without external data feeds.
